upgrade_response: modifier OR quarantined; negative controls and independent endpoints added
2x2 table and Haldane-Anscombe/Woolf 95% CI added; interpreted as routing concentration, not independent biological effect size
triangulation across temporal, environment, semantic, identity-meaning, curation-action, and rolling-origin endpoints
condition-label drift decomposed into real environment shift, submitter-change same-variant drift, and MeSH/OMIM or term-rename drift in the row-level inherited-arrhythmia temporal table
true-blind expert endpoint adjudication run packet created to replace ClinVar drift as primary validation endpoint once real verdicts are returned

ClinVar drift is adjudicated against locally available MONDO/OMIM/HPO identifiers, environment maps, ClinGen/VCEP coverage artifacts, and submitter-noise flags; claims are recomputed on true-environment-shift and true+uncertain endpoints
macro/micro metrics, downsampling, domain bootstrap, and leave-one-domain-out analyses
continuous frontier plotted separately for hereditary cancer and cardiomyopathy plus inherited arrhythmia to test whether frontier shape is an oncology sample-size artifact
inherited-arrhythmia signal is treated as high-value but underpowered; SADS/CPVT receives a five-reviewer priority addendum rather than big-N equivalence claims
leave-one-gene, leave-one-gene-family, leave-one-environment, and leave-one-domain validation tests whether CAB regime signal survives removal of BRCA/MMR/SCN5A/LMNA/desmosomal/sarcomere groups
post-hoc ontology comparator is separated from baseline-only ontology forecasting; CAB increment is reported over gene+baseline-ontology without follow-up label leakage
214 matched versus 728 unmatched AlphaMissense observability is quantified; ClinVar submitter-count proxy checked; missing row-level AM-score distribution is quarantined as a claim boundary
curator utility and review-budget enrichment reported in addition to AUROC
Brier score, calibration slope/intercept, ECE, risk-decile plot, and decision-curve net benefit are added
CAB direct-use drift depletion and overrestricted-stable repair rescue are quantified so CAB is not framed as merely blocking everything
external comparator support is quantified directionally and CAB-specific validation is routed to adjudication casebook
VCEP-covered and SADS-gene assertions are sampled into a partial external agreement proxy table
SADS retained as high-value adjudication pathway rather than caveat-only use case
SCN5A/KCNQ1/KCNH2/RYR2/LMNA/PKP2/DSP/CASQ2/TRDN/KCNE contexts are summarized for wrong reuse, review routing, and preserved direct use
